release_notes: Diagnostic updater + Mark-of-the-Web fix. Auto-restart after in-place launcher update silently failed because the updater PowerShell script swallowed every error and self-deleted. Now: Unblock-File on the new launcher exe before Start-Process (strips MOTW that ZIPs from the internet carry), drop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue (exception messages reach the log), step-by-step trace written to updater.log (robocopy exit code, Unblock-File outcome, Start-Process PID or error), no self-delete after run so failures stay diagnosable. 0.3.83's broken updater can't auto-restart into 0.3.84 — install manually one more time, from 0.3.84+ auto-restart should work.
